Guideline: Mixed formality. Predominantly formal usted form but occasional informal tu. The formal register should be preferred for consistency.
Professional and courteous. Por favor used in prompts.
Gender-inclusive notation with slash: colaborador/a, colaboradores/as, un/a colaborador/a. The term colaborador/a is the primary term for worker/employee.
Spanish capitalization: only first word and proper nouns capitalized in titles.
Standard double quotes for feature names.
Inverted question marks for questions. Colons for labels.
Descriptive multi-word constructions: Configuracion del widget de plantilla, Bibliotecas de comportamientos.
Kept: Widget, Analytics Hub, Data Modeler, Feedback, Chat, SFTP, API, CSV. Check-in translated as Consulta. PII becomes IPI (Informacion Personal Identificable).
Infinitive for buttons: Publicar, Cancelar, Actualizar. Note inconsistency between Habilitar and Activar for Enable - should be standardized.
Enable: Habilitar la funcion X or Activar widget de X. Confirmations: Esta seguro de que desea...? Success: se publicaron correctamente.

Check-in=Consulta; Review=Evaluacion; Goal=Objetivo; Worker=Colaborador/a or Trabajador; Manager=Responsable; Compensation=Compensacion; Behavior=Comportamiento; PII=IPI; Career Development=Desarrollo profesional; Settings=Configuracion
